name: Boca Catalina
description: Small protected cove locals prefer to keep low-key — catamarans pass offshore while you snorkel. Marine reserve protections help fish populations thrive close to shore.

rockiness.beach: White sand pocket in a protected cove; rocky at the edges 🏖️
rockiness.ocean_floor: Shallow reef and coral heads within 10–30 m of shore 🪸

live_rating.water_quality_note: Provisional estimate — not lab-tested; live water quality later

characteristics.depth_profile: Protected small cove — shallow reef within 10–30 m of shore; gradual depth to 2–3 m over coral heads.
characteristics.stone_rocks: Rocky in places around cove edges; sandy pocket in center
characteristics.access: Small roadside parking between Malmok and Arashi; arrive early
characteristics.facilities: None — bring own snorkel gear, water, and shade
fun_facts: Small protected cove locals prefer to keep low-key — catamarans pass offshore while you snorkel.
Marine reserve protections help fish populations thrive close to shore.
